dsl_rule.translation_notes: Pattern interpreted as: closing price confirmation (close > prev_close) combined with upward breakout (close > prev_high) in downtrend context (detected via SMA relationship). Exit condition set to reversal signal when price closes below SMA_20. Success rates 93% bull / 75% bear noted in parameters but not directly encoded as stop thresholds.

backtest_rule.reason: Pattern interpreted as: closing price confirmation (close > prev_close) combined with upward breakout (close > prev_high) in downtrend context (detected via SMA relationship). Exit condition set to reversal signal when price closes below SMA_20. Success rates 93% bull / 75% bear noted in parameters but not directly encoded as stop thresholds.

source_rule_text: Pattern: Closing price confirmation reversal - breakout up in downtrend signals reversal
